title: A Genius With Amnesia - Victor Savkin, Nx
summary: Victor Savkin argues that current coding agents are severely limited by their inability to see and retain information about large codebases, using the analogy of a world-class engineer with amnesia. He proposes that solving context and memory problems is essential to unlocking agent autonomy in software development.
